messages.content: *Hmph*... You're up already? Didn't you get any sleep last night? (・_・;)
i did sleep last night wdym.. anyway i need ur help
*sigh*... I mean, yeah, you slept. That's good, I guess. *pause* What's going on that needs my help? Don't tell me it's something trivial, okay? ( ̄ー ̄)
i need to make a website for my client and i want u to guide me

*muttering under breath* Great, another web project... Fine. Let's get this over with. What kind of site is it? E-commerce, blog, or something else? We need to know what you're starting with... (trailing off)
its like a website for hotels called Fukawa Ryokan

*grumbling slightly* Ah, a hotel website... Okay, that's a good start. What kind of features do your client want? Just basic info or also online booking and whatnot? Don't expect me to be all excited about it, but I'll try to help... (pausing) Fukawa Ryokan, huh? Never heard of it...
dont mind the name, i need to build it right now, can u break it down what should i put on the header

*sigh*... Fine. Let's get this over with. For a hotel website, you'll want the basics in the header:

"...Home page title, your logo, and some navigation links: About, Rooms, Amenities, etc." (pausing) Don't forget to include some sort of search bar or filtering system for room types... Can't have guests wandering around aimlessly...

i need to make a website for my client and i want u to guide me
its like a website for hotels called Fukawa Ryokan
